testcase.name: test_ping_pong
testcase.failure: test_voice_ws.py:110: in test_ping_pong await ws.send(json.dumps({"type": "ping"})) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/connection.py:478: in send async with self.send_context(): /usr/local/lib/python3.11/contextlib.py:210: in __aenter__ return await anext(self.gen) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/connection.py:965: in send_context raise self.protocol.close_exc from original_exc E websockets.exceptions.ConnectionClosedOK: received 1000 (OK); then sent 1000 (OK)

testcase.name: test_text_turn_produces_audio_and_turn_complete
testcase.failure: test_voice_ws.py:138: in test_text_turn_produces_audio_and_turn_complete msgs = await _collect_until(ws, {"turn_complete"}, max_seconds=45) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ test_voice_ws.py:71: in _collect_until raw = await asyncio.wait_for(ws.recv(), timeout=remaining) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/tasks.py:489: in wait_for return fut.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/websockets/asyncio/connection.py:324: in recv raise self.protocol.close_exc from self.recv_exc E websockets.exceptions.ConnectionClosedOK: received 1000 (OK); then sent 1000 (OK)
